# SevenRooms Vendor Inputs

Add SevenRooms reports for Summer Offers reservations, covers, revenue, guest tags, promo usage, or campaign-related dining activity.

Example files: reservation-export.csv, covers-by-day.xlsx, guest-tag-report.csv, campaign-revenue-summary.pdf.

Caveats: Confirm whether records reflect created date or reservation date, and note cancellations, no-shows, and source attribution gaps.
